message:
test(fnp-python): extend linalg_error_surface_probe with matrix_rank(empty)

Added empty (0, 3) matrix probe which triggers the 'zero-size array to
reduction' failure path. matrix_rank is one of cod's newer native fast
paths (b73cabe); this probe locks in that its error-type parity with
numpy.linalg.matrix_rank is preserved.
